title: DHCP failure / 169.254 address
safe_steps: Check if other devices on same network work.
advanced_steps: Verify VLAN, DHCP scope, DHCP relay/IP helper, switch port status.
do_not_do: Do not run destructive commands without approval.
Do not ask users to share passwords.
technician_notes: Confirm scope: one user, multiple users, or full site.
Record final fix into the client-specific KB.
source_basis: Integrated IT Support original support workflow
